title: jasionella bulgarica
intro: Jasionella bulgarica, also known as the Bulgarian chamomile, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Jasionella bulgarica can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
